steps.t: Bill Mossfoot is at the camp in the Midgewater Marsh, south-east of the Midgewater Ruins. Bill Mossfoot will be pleased to hear of your success with t…
Watcher Redweed is in Staddle town centre. The defeat of the goblin-chieftains in the Midgewater Marshes should be a great relief to Watcher Redweed.
